zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Hungerford於1378年6月22日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特法爾 格福德時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Hungerford48歲，母親Joan Hussey29歲。他於1402年9月18日之前與Katherine Peverell在英國可瓦爾海爾 白 聖 奧斯特爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1424年被列為steward to the household of henry v and henry vi。他去世於1449年8月9日在英國薩默塞特法爾 格福德享年71歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Hungerford于1378年6月22日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特法爾 格福德时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Hungerford48岁，母亲Joan Hussey29岁。他于1402年9月18日之前与Katherine Peverell在英国可瓦爾海爾 白 聖 奧斯特爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1424年被列为steward to the household of henry v and henry vi。他去世于1449年8月9日在英国薩默塞特法爾 格福德享年71岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Hungerford was born on 22 June 1378, in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas de Hungerford, was 48 and his mother, Joan Hussey, was 29. He married Katherine Peverell before 18 September 1402, in Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. In 1424, at the age of 46, his occupation is listed as steward to the household of henry v and henry vi. He died on 9 August 1449, in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England: Penhale by St Austell, Cornouailles, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Hungerford est né le 22 juin 1378, à Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Hungerford, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Joan Hussey, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Peverell avant 18 septembre 1402, à Penhale by St Austell, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. En 1424, à l’âge de 46 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est steward to the household of henry v and henry vi. Il est décédé le 9 août 1449, à Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Hungerford am 22. Juni 1378 in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Hungerford 48 und seine Mutter Joan Hussey 29. Er hat vor 18. September 1402 in Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England Katherine Peverell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1424, als er 46 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als steward to the household of henry v and henry vi aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. August 1449 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Hungerford è nato il il 22 giugno 1378 nel Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas de Hungerford, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Joan Hussey, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Peverell prima del 18 settembre 1402, nel Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1424, all'età di 46 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come steward to the household of henry v and henry vi. Morì il 9 agosto 1449, nel Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

ja.Hungerford, Somerset, England: イギリスイギリスソメルセトハンジャーフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Walter Hungerfordが1378年6月22日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトファルレイグ ハンジャーフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Hungerfordは48歳，母Joan Husseyは29歳であった。1402年9月18日以前にイギリスコルンワルペンヘイル ビー スト アウステルでKatherine Peverellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1424年，46歳の時，職業はsteward to the household of henry v and henry viと記録されている。彼は1449年8月9日にイギリスソメルセトファルレイグ ハンジャーフォードで71歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England: 영국 코른월 펜할 비 스트 오스텔
ko.lifeSummary: Walter Hungerford(이)가 1378년 6월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 패를리 헌그르퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Hungerford(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Hussey(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1402년 9월 18일 이전 영국 코른월 펜할 비 스트 오스텔에서 Katherine Peverell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1424년, 46세의 나이로 그의 직업은 steward to the household of henry v and henry vi이었다. 그는 1449년 8월 9일 영국 서머세트 패를리 헌그르퍼드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England: Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Hungerford nasceu em 22 de junho de 1378, em Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Hungerford, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Joan Hussey, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Peverell antes 18 de setembro de 1402, em Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1424, com 46 anos, sua profissão aparece como steward to the household of henry v and henry vi. Ele faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1449, em Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England: пенэл би ст аустелл, корнвалл, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Hungerford родился 22 июня 1378 г. в местности фарлиг хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Hungerford было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Hussey, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Peverell перед 18 сентябрь 1402 г. в местности пенэл би ст аустелл, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1424 году, в возрасте 46 лет,  он работал по профессии steward to the household of henry v and henry vi. Он умер 9 августа 1449 г. в местности фарлиг хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Hungerford nació el 22 de junio de 1378, en Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas de Hungerford, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Joan Hussey, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Katherine Peverell antes de 18 de septiembre de 1402, en Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1424, a la edad de 46 años, su ocupación registrada era steward to the household of henry v and henry vi. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1449, en Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
